45.evidenceText: No evidence found in provided sources of any major wheelset brands (DT Swiss, Mavic, Hunt, Zipp, ENVE, Roval) adopting Clik valve as standard in 2026 or 2027 product lines

Without direct evidence of Clik valve adoption by any of the six major brands mentioned, the percentage cannot be determined and no conversion has been documented.

57.evidenceText: Product listing pages for BBB Cycling CoreCap valve products on BIKE24 show product features and related items, but contain no stock status, availability dates, or restocking timeline information.
